brand.name: MBolt
brand.tagline: Making your brand impossible to ignore.
brand.description: Uganda's leading experiential marketing agency. Fifteen years of showing up, delivering, and being trusted again.

services.name: BTL / Experiential Marketing
services.description: We conceptualise and stage real experiences that hit people in the gut. Promotions, field activations, brand experiences — we've been doing this for fifteen years and we still love every second of it.

services.name: Communications
services.description: We build direct communication strategies that connect your brand with real people in memorable ways. One-on-one or mass — education, awareness, sensitisation — we know how to make a message land.

services.name: Sales & Distribution
services.description: Door to door isn't dead — it just needs to be done right. We execute distribution strategies based on your targets, mapping trade routes, placing products, and moving them off shelves.

services.name: General Supplies
services.description: We help clients connect the dots in an ever-expanding universe of supplies. Sourcing, delivery, relationships — we use our network and experience to keep you relevant and well-resourced.

work.name: Retail Outreach Campaign
work.alt: Orange Telecom retail outreach activation across Uganda

work.name: Branded Vans & Cannons
work.alt: Gorillo's Snacks branded activation vans and product cannons

work.name: Pay Campaign
work.alt: Pay campaign sales and distribution activation

work.name: Rural Outreach Campaign
work.alt: Smile Telecom rural community outreach campaign

team.name: Jude S. Tayebwa
team.bio: Two decades in the industry. He's worked with the largest agencies on the continent and knows every angle of what it takes to bring a brand to life in the field.

team.name: Patrick Angulo
team.bio: A founding partner whose business acumen was sharpened in India. Fifteen years across hospitality, microfinance and cable television — he makes things happen.

team.name: Abbey Senoga Ntege
team.bio: A certified accountant with 15 years navigating the financial landscape of Ugandan business. He keeps the ship steady and makes sure every shilling is working hard.

team.name: Gerald Mukasa
team.bio: 13 years across telecoms, fintech and health sectors. He keeps the engine running — day to day management of the agency and every project we take on.

team.name: David Lubwama
team.bio: The energy behind our field executions. He has worked with major brands in the service industry and is the drive behind every field layout we build.

team.name: Diana Kisakye
team.bio: Entrepreneurial mindset, supply chain expertise. Diana brings both innovation and precision to the logistical heartbeat of the agency's daily operations.

testimonials.quote: Association with MBolt has been great. They dive into the problem and do not hesitate in giving suggestions. They come up with fresh ideas and have always surpassed expectations.
testimonials.name: Val Muleba
testimonials.title: Product Manager
